# NVIDIA Q2 FY2026 Earnings Note

NVIDIA reported Q2 revenue of $44.2 billion [F2], exceeding consensus by $700 million [C1]. EPS (diluted) was $1.89 [F1].

The Data Center segment narrative updated significantly. "Data Center revenue reached $37.1 billion, driven by Blackwell architecture demand" [L1]

Stacy Rasgon from Bernstein pressed on Blackwell supply timing. "Blackwell supply is ramping rapidly. We expect supply to be in balance with demand by the end of calendar 2026. Customer lead times have shortened from over 52 weeks to under 26 weeks." [Q1]

Management committed to resolving the supply-demand imbalance. "we expect supply to be in balance with demand by the end of calendar 2026" [K1]
